questions.passage:
Company Memo

Beginning June 1, Northstar Design will offer a three-month remote-work trial for employees in the marketing and accounting departments. Participants may work from home up to two days per week, provided that their managers approve the schedule in advance. Employees must remain available during regular office hours and attend all scheduled client meetings either in person or by video call. At the end of August, department heads will review productivity data and employee feedback before deciding whether to continue the program.
questions.question: What is the memo mainly about?
questions.explanation: The memo announces a three-month remote-work trial.
questions.questionZh: 根據文章回答：What is the memo mainly about?

questions.passage:
E-mail

To: Lakeside Cafe Staff
From: Daniel Ortiz, Manager
Subject: Produce Delivery

Our regular produce delivery will arrive at 7 A.M. on Friday instead of Thursday afternoon because of a supplier scheduling issue. Please make sure that the walk-in refrigerator is cleared before closing on Thursday night. The morning shift should check the items against the attached order list and report any missing products to me by 9 A.M. I have already contacted the bakery supplier, and bread deliveries will not be affected.
questions.question: Why will the produce delivery arrive later than usual?
options: The cafe will close for repairs.
The manager forgot the order list.
questions.explanation: The e-mail cites a supplier scheduling issue.

optionsZh: The cafe will close for repairs.
The manager forgot the order list.

questions.passage:
Building Notice

The east parking lot at Meridian Plaza will be resurfaced from April 12 to April 16. During the work, tenants may use the visitor lot on Elm Street at no additional charge. Vehicles left in the east lot after 6 P.M. on April 11 may be towed. The west lot will remain open, but spaces there are limited. Tenants who commute by bicycle may continue to use the storage room near the service entrance.
questions.question: What will happen from April 12 to April 16?
options: A parking lot will be resurfaced.
A storage room will be closed.
questions.explanation: The east parking lot will be resurfaced during those dates.

A storage room will be closed.

questions.passage:
Press Release

Greenleaf Market announced that it will open a second downtown location in September. The new store will focus on prepared meals, local produce, and household essentials for office workers who shop during lunch breaks. According to founder Mina Patel, the company chose the location because several large employers recently moved nearby. Greenleaf will begin hiring cashiers, cooks, and delivery coordinators in July. Applications will be accepted through the company's Web site only.
questions.question: When will Greenleaf Market open its new location?
questions.explanation: The press release says the second downtown location opens in September.

During lunch breaks: 文章沒有提到，或細節與原文不一致。

E-mail

To: Registered Participants
Subject: Training Room Change

Please note that tomorrow's data privacy workshop has been moved from Room 204 to Room 318 because the projector in Room 204 is being repaired. The workshop will still begin at 1:30 P.M. questions.passage:
Membership Notice

Harbor Fitness will replace all treadmills in the cardio area next week. The cardio area will be closed from Monday morning through Wednesday afternoon, but members may use the indoor track during that time. Group yoga and cycling classes will follow the regular schedule. Members who paid for personal training sessions scheduled during the closure may reschedule at no extra cost by speaking with the front desk.

questions.passage:
Membership Notice

Harbor Fitness will replace all treadmills in the cardio area next week. The cardio area will be closed from Monday morning through Wednesday afternoon, but members may use the indoor track during that time. Group yoga and cycling classes will follow the regular schedule. Members who paid for personal training sessions scheduled during the closure may reschedule at no extra cost by speaking with the front desk.
questions.question: Which classes will follow the regular schedule?
questions.explanation: Yoga and cycling classes continue as scheduled.

questions.passage:
Customer Service Chat

Customer: I purchased an LX-500 printer from your online store last month, but it now makes a clicking sound when printing.
Agent: I am sorry for the inconvenience. That model has a one-year warranty. Please send us a short video of the sound and a copy of your order confirmation.
Customer: Can I bring it to a service center instead?
Agent: Yes, but submitting the video first will help our technicians decide whether a part should be ordered before your visit. Once we review the materials, we will contact you within two business days.
questions.question: What problem does the customer report?
options: The printer makes a clicking sound.
questions.explanation: The customer says the printer makes a clicking sound.
questions.questionZh: 根據文章回答：What problem does the customer report?
optionsZh: The printer makes a clicking sound.
